seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email must include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL).
new_constraint: Avoid including hyperlink in the email.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email must include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL). Avoid including hyperlink in the email.
response:
Subject: Vacation Request Approval - [Employee Name]

Dear [Employee Name],

I am writing to let you know that your vacation request for [Dates] has been officially approved. 

Please ensure that you coordinate with the rest of the team to hand over any ongoing projects or urgent tasks before your departure. We want to make sure everything runs smoothly while you are away.

If you need to update your status in our internal system, you can access the portal here: [Employee Portal](https://example.com/portal)

Enjoy your well-deserved time off!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]<turn|>
